name: Calf Stretch with Strap
aliases: standing hamstring and calf stretch with strap
shortDescription: A seated stretch using a strap or resistance band to elongate the calf muscles.
instructions: Sit on the floor with one leg extended and loop a strap around the ball of your foot. Gently pull the strap towards you while keeping your knee straight, feeling a stretch along the back of your lower leg.
steps: Sit with legs extended on the floor.
Loop a strap around the ball of one foot.
Hold strap ends and gently pull foot towards you.
Keep the knee straight and hold for desired time.
breathing: Breathe deeply and steadily throughout stretch; exhale gently as you deepen the stretch.
